workflow_opportunities.title: AI Support: AI-assisted scheduling and engagement pattern analysis
workflow_opportunities.current_process: Staff coordinate volunteer shifts, track community engagement manually, and produce program reports using spreadsheets and shared documents.
workflow_opportunities.pain_point: No specific pain points documented — further discussion needed to identify workflow friction.
workflow_opportunities.possible_ai_support: AI-assisted scheduling and engagement pattern analysis
human_review_points: All AI-generated summaries must be reviewed by a staff member before saving to records.
AI-drafted communications must be approved by a human before sending.
Staff capacity decisions must be made by program leads, not automated.
Final decisions on workflow changes require human approval.
risks_or_exceptions: No specific failure cases documented yet

workflow_opportunities.title: AI Support: AI-assisted meeting note summarization and action item extraction
workflow_opportunities.current_process: Staff manually enter data into spreadsheets or forms, produce recurring reports, and store documents in shared folders. There is no automated workflow.
workflow_opportunities.pain_point: Manual documentation is time-consuming and inconsistent across staff members.
workflow_opportunities.possible_ai_support: AI-assisted meeting note summarization and action item extraction
knowledge_sources_needed: Spreadsheets or databases with program data
human_review_points: All AI-generated summaries must be reviewed by a staff member before saving to records.
AI-drafted communications must be approved by a human before sending.
Policy compliance decisions require human judgment — AI suggestions are advisory only.
Staff capacity decisions must be made by program leads, not automated.
Final decisions on workflow changes require human approval.
risks_or_exceptions: Key information from meetings is lost or not shared with relevant staff
Manual data entry errors lead to incorrect reports and rework
Policy updates are not consistently communicated or applied across the team

workflow_opportunities.title: AI Support: General workflow mapping to identify highest-impact AI insertion points
workflow_opportunities.current_process: Staff use a mix of email, shared documents, and in-person meetings to coordinate programs. Documentation practices are informal and vary by staff member.
workflow_opportunities.pain_point: No specific pain points documented — further discussion needed to identify workflow friction.
workflow_opportunities.possible_ai_support: General workflow mapping to identify highest-impact AI insertion points
human_review_points: All AI-generated summaries must be reviewed by a staff member before saving to records.
AI-drafted communications must be approved by a human before sending.
Staff capacity decisions must be made by program leads, not automated.
Final decisions on workflow changes require human approval.
risks_or_exceptions: No specific failure cases documented yet
workflow_opportunities.staff_impact: Staff may fear AI replaces rather than assists their work — emphasize augmentation, not automation.
next_discovery_questions: Formal documentation of current workflows is not available — would benefit from a workflow mapping session.

failure_cases.what_failed: No specific failure cases documented yet
failure_cases.why_it_failed: Interaction notes do not describe past failures or exceptions
failure_cases.missing_context: Failure mode analysis has not been conducted
failure_cases.human_review_required: Staff should reflect on past challenges to identify recurring failure patterns
failure_cases.suggested_prevention: Schedule a retrospective session to document past workflow failures and contributing factors

failure_cases.what_failed: Key information from meetings is lost or not shared with relevant staff
failure_cases.why_it_failed: No standardized note-taking format or centralized documentation repository
failure_cases.missing_context: Meeting notes are stored in personal files or emailed to select individuals
failure_cases.human_review_required: Staff need to decide what information is relevant to share and with whom
failure_cases.suggested_prevention: Adopt a shared note-taking template and centralized documentation practice with distribution list

failure_cases.what_failed: Manual data entry errors lead to incorrect reports and rework
failure_cases.why_it_failed: No validation checks or automated data entry — entirely dependent on human accuracy
failure_cases.missing_context: No audit trail for data entry — errors are hard to trace
failure_cases.human_review_required: Data quality checks need human judgment to distinguish genuine errors from edge cases
failure_cases.suggested_prevention: Introduce input validation, automated data checks, and regular audit reviews

failure_cases.what_failed: Policy updates are not consistently communicated or applied across the team
failure_cases.why_it_failed: Policy changes are shared via email and rely on individual awareness
failure_cases.missing_context: No centralized policy repository or version control
failure_cases.human_review_required: Staff need to interpret how policy changes apply to their specific workflows
failure_cases.suggested_prevention: Maintain a centralized policy repository with change notifications and mandatory review checkpoints

failure_cases.what_failed: No specific failure cases documented yet
failure_cases.why_it_failed: Interaction notes do not describe past failures or exceptions
failure_cases.missing_context: Failure mode analysis has not been conducted
failure_cases.human_review_required: Staff should reflect on past challenges to identify recurring failure patterns
failure_cases.suggested_prevention: Schedule a retrospective session to document past workflow failures and contributing factors

failure_cases.what_failed: Follow-ups are missed when staff are absent or overwhelmed
failure_cases.why_it_failed: No centralized tracking system — relies on individual memory and email inbox
failure_cases.missing_context: No automated reminders or shared task list
failure_cases.human_review_required: Follow-up assignments need human judgment on priority and timing
failure_cases.suggested_prevention: Implement a shared follow-up tracking system with automated reminders and weekly review
